package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for strings_split_same_input_multiple_times: the same string input is split multiple times in one function.
type CaseStringsSplitSameInputMultipleTimesDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

func PositiveStringsSplitSameInputMultipleTimes(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStringsSplitSameInputMultipleTimesDTO) error {
    parts := strings.Split(input, ",")
    fields := strings.Split(input, ":")
    _ = parts
    _ = fields
    return nil
}
